label: Transparent dumbo octopus motif
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: transparent cutout source for a Morphous design-system motif
Primary request: Create a single dumbo octopus with rounded ear-like fins as the hero motif for a gentle discovery UI system.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one soft dumbo octopus floating front three-quarter view, compact rounded mantle, wide fin-like ears, small curled arms, calm curious posture.
Style: polished semi-real 3D clay-and-silk illustration, soft pink grey body, warm grey underside, faint pearlescent highlights, subtle midnight-blue rim shading only on the subject, delicate deep-sea translucency but opaque clean edges.
Composition: centered full subject, generous padding, no cropping, no ground plane, no cast shadow.
Background removal constraints: the background must be one uniform #00ff00 color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject. Crisp separated silhouette suitable for chroma-key alpha extraction.
Avoid: text, labels, watermark, random brand names, extra animals, bubbles, scenery, props, floor, shadow, reflection, harsh contrast.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-resolution 16:9 Morphous design-system board, target 3840x2160
Primary request: Create the LIGHT mode design-system board for "Dumbo Octopus", a gentle discovery system inspired by soft pink grey dumbo octopus fins in the deep sea.
Reference motif: a soft pink-grey dumbo octopus cutout with rounded ear-like fins, calm curious posture, pearlescent warm grey highlights, and midnight-blue rim shading.
Canvas: 16:9, ultra high resolution, crisp readable UI labels, no watermark, no random brand names.
Mood: gentle discovery, calm exploration, approachable data, soft biological curves, quiet deep-sea neutrals.
Palette: soft shell pink #EAB7BC, fin blush #D99AA5, warm pearl grey #D8D1CA, fog white #F7F4F0, pale abyss #DCE4EA, muted ink #243044, midnight blue #121B35, sea-glass accent #7DA7AD.
Layout: polished design-system presentation board with a clean light background, organized full-width sections, not a marketing page.
Required sections with readable labels: Palette, Typography EN/JP, Buttons, Inputs, Select, Textarea, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Tabs, Badges, Alerts, Cards, Table, Command Search, Top Navigation, Sidebar Navigation, Dashboard Metrics, Line Chart, Bar Chart, Donut Chart, Status States, Empty Error Loading, Spacing Radius Shadow Tokens, Motif Texture.
UI direction: rounded 8px components, soft pink primary actions, warm grey surfaces, midnight blue text, pale deep-sea gridlines, subtle fin-shaped curves as accents, charts using pink, sea-glass, warm grey, midnight blue, and pale blue.
Data content: use generic labels only such as Overview, Discoveries, Depth, Signal, Samples, Status, Active, Pending, Complete, Search, Name, Zone, Updated. Keep text large and credible.
Avoid: tiny unreadable token tables, random company or product names, watermark, logos, saturated purple gradients, dark blobs, decorative orbs, heavy shadows, illegible text, animal scene backgrounds.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-resolution 16:9 Morphous design-system board, target 3840x2160
Primary request: Create the DARK mode design-system board for "Dumbo Octopus", the same gentle discovery system translated into a midnight deep-sea interface.
Reference motif: a soft pink-grey dumbo octopus cutout with rounded ear-like fins, calm curious posture, pearlescent warm grey highlights, and midnight-blue rim shading. Keep the same component language as the light board.
Canvas: 16:9, ultra high resolution, crisp readable UI labels, no watermark, no random brand names.
Mood: quiet deep sea, gentle discovery, luminous soft pink controls, readable dashboards, calm exploration rather than dramatic sci-fi.
Palette: midnight blue #0D1428, abyss ink #121B35, deep slate #1C2638, soft shell pink #EAB7BC, fin blush #D99AA5, warm pearl grey #D8D1CA, pale abyss #DCE4EA, sea-glass accent #7DA7AD.
Layout: polished design-system presentation board with dark background, organized full-width sections, same system identity as light mode.
Required sections with readable labels: Palette, Typography EN/JP, Buttons, Inputs, Select, Textarea, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Tabs, Badges, Alerts, Cards, Table, Command Search, Top Navigation, Sidebar Navigation, Dashboard Metrics, Line Chart, Bar Chart, Donut Chart, Status States, Empty Error Loading, Spacing Radius Shadow Tokens, Motif Texture.
UI direction: 8px radius components, midnight surfaces, soft pink primary actions, warm grey secondary controls, pale blue borders, sea-glass focus rings, fin-shaped curves as subtle separators, chart colors in pink, sea-glass, pearl grey, pale blue, and muted coral.
Data content: use generic labels only such as Overview, Discoveries, Depth, Signal, Samples, Status, Active, Pending, Complete, Search, Name, Zone, Updated. Keep text large and credible.
Avoid: tiny unreadable token tables, random company or product names, watermark, logos, saturated purple gradients, black-on-black unreadable UI, decorative orbs, heavy glow, animal scene backgrounds.
